{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201231015664D08A10416CDB7AC7"}"},"total":1452},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7509479452776366872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不得不说 这种类型的我真的从来没看过，特别喜欢看皇帝和季今宵 小十一的相处日常 感觉很好玩！就是最后皇帝死时都没有再看见主角 感觉还是很遗憾的……而且本人是不喜欢看有女主的文的 但是这本我很喜欢 女主出场总共没有五次好像 而且女主人设也很讨喜 跟主角一样懒懒散散的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748440584,"group_id":"7388411892819037208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1UV2UXxanrwVyoHS3wiVEhSsZ3vWSzH1NzQYB4NovEj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/867d471f1aa946fb98f6e87d7270e590~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534364&x-signature=uP6UMcXoDs6Vs6NkJ%2BXVDdMLR18%3D","user_id":"2981504819135856","user_name":"漁漁i"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2981504819135856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965511,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7388411892819037208","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+架空+单女主+感情戏少+女主出场晚】
作为宠冠后宫的季贵妃唯一亲弟弟——季今宵，纨绔之名声动京城。
朝臣咆哮：季今宵目无法纪，不敬师长，不学无术，与民争利！

刚藏好一箱亲弟弟贿赂的珍宝，季贵妃哭哭啼啼，偷偷用力掐大腿：
陛下，臣妾弟弟年纪尚幼，他们这是冲着臣妾来的呀！呜呜呜……臣妾就这么一个亲人了。

收到孝敬的皇帝：今宵年纪还小，诸君不要小题大做，一把年纪了还盯着孩子不放。
————————
多年后，成为国舅的季今宵叉腰，眺目远望：还有谁！
成了太后的季贵妃：这小混蛋还是这么不着调
成了皇帝的十一皇子摇头失笑：舅舅还是这么……有活力。
总之就是主打轻松幽默，诙谐有趣，从抱粗大腿到变成粗大腿的故事。

（背景虚构，请勿考究，一切设定为剧情服务。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/420221709625ba99cdfcc944bd2d162e","author":"只吃三碗","author_id":"","book_id":"7388411892819037208","book_name":"我姐姐是后宫宠妃","book_short_name":"望甥成龙","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7392086212820877848","read_count":"31115","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"832595"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"383","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o78359fc3d12d12580cdd28d042b8c789~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165061&x-signature=kxp2yO9i2eFvhVsq1Xp60sQT7rQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"106552342882","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"499"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201231015664D08A10416CDB7AC7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":257,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":85551,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4468},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403677123301606206","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，有意思，不希望有CP，因为他跟这个时代的人存在思想差异，我觉得这样能互相喜欢吗？或者说主角会因为什么喜欢上一
